title: 优肯418色
description: 优肯 / Artkal 418色（C197 + M221 官方合并）

market.label: 进阶全量/官方体系
market.summary: 优肯/Artkal 418 色是 C197 + M221 的官方合并口径，色域和官方出处强；对普通手工小店不是最便宜默认选择，但对进阶备货和精细图纸很有价值。
evidence: Artkal 官方分别发布 C197 和 M221 RGB chart。
比特拼豆称 Artkal 色号丰富，并把 Artkal/MARD 纳入主流色卡体系。
拼豆酱面向中国玩家列出优肯 Artkal，并标注其色彩丰富。

sources.notes: Extracted from official Artkal RGB PDF.
Official 197-color chart image shows this RGB; the official RGB PDF labels this color as Silver without numeric RGB.
Official RGB PDF text renders/extracts B as 273; official 197-color chart image shows this RGB.
Reference RGB sampled from visible swatches in the official Artkal C-series color chart image; these CG/CP/CT special-material values are not published in the official RGB PDF.
Extracted from official Artkal RGB PDF.

Bitbead displays Artkal Mini MH1 Transparent as #FFFFFF; Artkal official RGB PDF labels MH1 as Transparent without numeric RGB, so this is a display placeholder, not an official numeric physical color.
